right_offer.title: Canon EF-M 18-150mm f/3.5-6.3 IS STM (Black)
right_offer.description: The ideal 'all-in-one' lens for EOS M users, looking for unlimited creative opportunities. Featuring 8.3x optical zoom, 4-stop optical Image Stabilizer and STM focusing technology.

task.policy_text: Return match only if both offers refer to the same core product and not merely a related accessory, bundle, storage variant, color variant, or neighboring model.
